---
title: "Group_05_Analysis"
author: "Group 5"
date: "06/03/2025"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 2
    toc-location: body
    number-sections: false
execute:
  echo: false
---

# Introduction
### Year vs prevalence

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(kableExtra)
library(sjPlot)
library(performance)
library(DHARMa)
obesity<-read.csv("DAProject5.csv")
obesity$Year<-as.factor((obesity$Year))
obesity$Obese<-as.factor((obesity$Obese))
obesity$Education<-as.factor((obesity$Education))
obesity$Veg<-as.factor((obesity$Veg))
obesity$Fruit<-as.factor((obesity$Fruit))
obesity$Sex<-as.factor(obesity$Sex)
```

# Explanatory Data Analysis


# Formal Data Analysis


# Conclusion


# References


# R Studio Language
